commands.review_summary:
The PR tags provider-supplemental model catalog rows, adds a warn-only doctor check for explicit model allowlists that hide those rows, adds focused coverage/changelog text, and repairs OpenAI Codex `gpt-5.5` image-input metadata for sparse configured rows.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main loads provider-supplemental catalog rows and explicit `agents.defaults.models` entries gate model availability, while doctor only checks the `hooks.gmail.model` case today. I did not run a live doctor command because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the PR should wait for contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the new doctor warning.

target.title: feat(doctor): warn about hidden provider catalog models
target.body:
## Summary
- mark provider-supplied supplemental model catalog rows with stable catalog provenance
- add a warn-only doctor contribution for explicit agents.defaults.models allowlists hiding provider-supplied catalog models
- include opt-in guidance without changing the allowlist automatically

Fixes #39992.

## Testing
- pnpm test src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/agents/model-catalog.test.ts src/agents/model-selection.test.ts src/commands/models/list.list-command.forward-compat.test.ts extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts extensions/openai/openai-codex-provider.test.ts src/plugins/provider-runtime.test.ts
- pnpm test src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/model-catalog.ts src/agents/model-catalog.types.ts src/agents/model-catalog.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts CHANGELOG.md
- pnpm check:changed
- git diff --check
target.author: sercada
